Wine Flights | Grand Tour of the Mediter.description: Our signature flight featuring sparkling wines from around the Mediterranean. Enjoy a 2oz tasting of each: Val D'oca, Rosé Prosecco, Italy, Marqués de Cáceres, Cava, Penedès, Spain, G.H. Mumm, Grand Cordon, Reims, France, Domaine Spiropoulos, Ode Panos, Mantinia, Greece
Wine Flights | Grand Tour of the Mediter.park_area: Walt Disney World Swan and Dolphin Hotels

Wine Flights | Journey through Greece.description: This flight features some of Greece's signature varietals. Tasting through a white, rose and red wine. Enjoy a 3oz tasting of each: Zoe, Roditis, Peloponnese, 2020, Croix de Peyrassol, Mediterranee, 2020, Boutari Kretikos, Crete, 2019
Wine Flights | Journey through Greece.park_area: Walt Disney World Swan and Dolphin Hotels

Wine Flights | Mediterranean Red Wine Vo.description: Explore what the Mediterranean has to offer with these three red wines. Enjoy a 3oz tasting of each: Caparzo, Sangiovese, Tuscany, Italy, 2019, Piccolo Fiore, Syrah- Nero d'Avola, Terre Siciliane, Italy, 2019, Bodegas, La Cartuja Priorat, Spain, 2018
Wine Flights | Mediterranean Red Wine Vo.park_area: Walt Disney World Swan and Dolphin Hotels

Wine Flights | Mediterranean White Wine.description: Explore what the Mediterranean has to offer with these three white wines. Enjoy a 3oz tasting of each: Pighin, Pinot Grigio, Fruili, Italy, 2020, Fleurs de Prairie, Rosé, Côtes de Provence, France 2020, Pieropan, Soave Classico, Italy, 2019
Wine Flights | Mediterranean White Wine.park_area: Walt Disney World Swan and Dolphin Hotels

Wines by the Bottle | Ask Your Server fo.park_area: Walt Disney World Swan and Dolphin Hotels
